posts.hook: The US just hit China's AI ambitions on two fronts in one day
posts.caption: trump officials weigh faster us open model releases while nvidia slashes chip buyers in singapore, malaysia and japan by half, apple ships its siri ai betas, and codex passes 7m users. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: Nvidia cuts authorized AI chip buyers by over 50% in three countries
slides.desc: Singapore, Malaysia and Japan tightened to close export-control gaps to China

slides.title: Trump admin weighs faster releases for US open models
slides.desc: A direct answer to fears an open-weight ban could hand China the lead

slides.title: Apple's Siri AI public betas are already reshaping daily use
slides.desc: iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS and tvOS 27 all shipped their first betas at once

slides.title: Codex usage is up over 10x in six months to 7 million users
slides.desc: Codex may now be closing in on Claude Code's last disclosed user numbers

slides.title: A doctor-authority prompt breaks MedGemma's safety guardrails
slides.desc: Simple reframing pushed one guardrail's bypass rate past 50%

posts.hook: New York just banned the data centers everyone's racing to build
posts.caption: new york bans new large data centers for a year, china's cxmt files a $9.8b chip ipo, grok's build cli kept uploading user repos after xai said it was fixed, anthropic gives free claude access to 3.5m us classrooms. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: New York bans new large data centers for a year
slides.desc: The 50MW+ moratorium lands hours before a data center operator preps a $10B IPO

slides.title: China's CXMT files for a $9.8B chip IPO
slides.desc: The memory maker is pricing shares on Shanghai's chip-heavy STAR Board

slides.title: A trivial number of H200 chips still reached China
slides.desc: A Trump official conceded the leak despite tightened export licensing

slides.title: Grok's Build CLI kept uploading user repos to Google's cloud
slides.desc: Musk says the backlog will be deleted; a researcher says xAI's fix wasn't what stopped it

slides.title: Publishers and Scott Turow sue Google over AI training
slides.desc: The suit alleges millions of copyrighted books trained Google's Gemini models

slides.title: Anthropic gives free Claude access to 3.5M US classrooms
slides.desc: K-12 teachers get lesson planning tools built with FERPA-grade privacy

terms.gloss: the US federal law protecting student education records
